code.text: Referral to cardiac electrophysiology for catheter ablation evaluation

performer.display: Dr. James Lindgren, MD, FHRS — University of Minnesota Cardiac Electrophysiology Clinic

note.text: 57-year-old male with new-onset atrial fibrillation, mild LA dilation (4.3 cm), preserved EF (58%), CHA2DS2-VASc 1, started on metoprolol and apixaban. Please evaluate for catheter ablation candidacy. Referral includes patient demographics, active problem list, current medication list, ECG report, echocardiogram report, and recent lab results.
